name: Layoutz

values.name: alignCenter
values.comment: Align text to the center within specified width

values.name: alignLeft
values.comment: Align text to the left within specified width

values.name: alignRight
values.comment: Align text to the right within specified width

values.name: hrWith
values.comment: Horizontal rule with the character of your choice

values.name: hrWithOfLength
values.comment: Horizontal rule with the character of your choice, of a length

values.name: justify
values.comment: Justify text (spread words evenly to fill width)

values.name: sectionOfSizeWith
values.type: String.String -> String.String -> Basics.Int -> List.List Layoutz.Element -> Layoutz.Element

values.name: spinner
values.comment: A loading spinner that can be animated

values.name: tightRow
values.comment: Create horizontal row with no spacing between elements (for gradients, etc.)

values.name: underlineColored
values.comment:
Add colored underline with custom character and color

    Layoutz.underlineColored "=" Ansi.Color.Red <| Layoutz.text "Error Section"

    Layoutz.underlineColored "~" Ansi.Color.Green <| Layoutz.text "Success"

    Layoutz.underlineColored "─" Ansi.Color.BrightCyan <| Layoutz.text "Info"

values.name: vrWith
values.comment: Vertical rule with the character of your choice

values.name: vrWithOfLength
values.comment: Vertical rule with the character of your choice, of a length
